chain.thought: Explanation: Counting the featured guests for each song, most tracks have 0–2 guests. “Keep Hustlin” has 2 (E-40 & Too Short) and “Cheddar” has 2 (Mack 10 & Ice Cube). “Like That” has 3 featured guests (Ice Cube, Daz Dillinger & CJ Mac), which is the most.

judge_thought:
Explanation: Counting the featured guests per track: 
- "the shadiest one" (CJ Mac) = 1
- "can't hold back" (Ice Cube) = 1
- "keep hustlin" (E-40 & Too Short) = 2
- "like that" (Ice Cube, Daz Dillinger & CJ Mac) = 3
- "cheddar" (Mack 10 & Ice Cube) = 2
- "better days" (Ron Banks) = 1
All other tracks have no listed guests. The maximum is 3 on "like that," so the Prediction Answer is correct.
